description: This SAS code processes sales data using RETAIN to track customer-specific metrics across observations. It calculates running totals with customer_total_sales, consecutive purchase days with consecutive_days, day-to-day changes with day_over_day_change, and a 30-day moving average with sum_30_days and sales_count retained variables. The code uses FIRST./LAST. processing with BY groups, lag patterns to identify trends, and conditional logic to evaluate high-value customers. Multiple retained variables work together to build complex, observation-spanning calculations.
